scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=api" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.agents:all: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run start --workspace=agents/fetcher" "npm run start --workspace=agents/deduper" "npm run start --workspace=agents/classifier" "npm run start --workspace=agents/summarizer" "npm run start --workspace=agents/reshare" "npm run start --workspace=agents/analytics"
scripts.db:deploy: cd shared && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.start:api: npm run db:deploy && npm run start --workspace=api
